stemHtml:
Which of these statements about "tuck under" are correct or incorrect?

I. A contributing factor to "tuck under" is a forward movement of the centre of pressure of the wing.
II. A contributing factor to "tuck under" is an increase in the downwash angle at the location of the horizontal stabiliser.

options.a: I is incorrect, II is incorrect.
options.b: I is correct, II is correct.
options.c: I is correct, II is incorrect.
options.d: I is incorrect, II is correct.
